2604.23924.title: Agentic AI platforms for autonomous training and rule induction of human-human and virus-human protein-protein interactions
2604.23924.paper_summary: We instruct an AI agent to construct two separate agentic AI platforms: one for autonomous training of predictive ML models for human-human and virus-human PPI, and the other for inducing explicit general rules governing human-human and virus-human PPI. The first agentic AI platform for autonomous training of predictive ML models for PPI is designed to consist of five AI agents that handle autonomous data collection, data verification, feature embedding, model design, and training and validation on three-way protein-disjoint cross-fold datasets. For human-human and human-virus PPIs, the final three-way protein-disjoint ensemble achieves an accuracy of 87.3% and 86.5%, respectively. For cross-checking and interpretability purposes, the second agentic AI platform is designed to replace ML predictions with human-readable rules derived from protein embeddings, physicochemical autocovariance descriptors, compartment annotations, pathway-domain overlap, and graph contexts. For human-human PPI, it is defined by a two-rule induction, whereas human-virus is induced by a more complex set of weighted rules. The rules induced by the second agentic platform align with the SHAP-identified features from the predictive ML models built by the first agentic platform. Taken together, our work demonstrates the agentic AI's ability to orchestrate from data planning to execution, and from rule induction to explanation in ML, opening the door to various applications.
2604.23924.paper_summary_zh: 我們指示一個 AI 代理構建兩個獨立的代理 AI 平台：一個用於自主訓練人類-人類和病毒-人類 PPI 的預測 ML 模型，另一個用於引導明確的通用規則，規範人類-人類和病毒-人類 PPI。第一個用於自主訓練 PPI 預測 ML 模型的代理 AI 平台設計為由五個 AI 代理組成，這些代理負責自主數據收集、數據驗證、特徵嵌入、模型設計，以及在三向蛋白質不重疊交叉折疊數據集上的訓練和驗證。對於人類-人類和人類-病毒 PPI，最終的三向蛋白質不重疊集成模型分別達到了 87.3% 和 86.5% 的準確率。為了進行交叉檢查和可解釋性目的，第二個代理 AI 平台設計為用從蛋白質嵌入、物理化學自協方差描述符、區域註釋、途徑-領域重疊和圖形上下文中派生的人類可讀規則來替代 ML 預測。對於人類-人類 PPI，它由兩條規則引導，而人類-病毒則由一組更複雜的加權規則引導。第二個代理平台引導的規則與第一個代理平台構建的預測 ML 模型中的 SHAP 識別特徵相一致。總的來說，我們的工作展示了代理 AI 從數據規劃到執行，從規則引導到 ML 解釋的能力，為各種應用開啟了大門。
2604.23924.author: Hung N. Do et.al.
2604.23924.authors: Hung N. Do, Jessica Z. Kubicek-Sutherland, Oscar A. Negrete, S. Gnanakaran
